cases.purpose: Validate explicit skill mention routes to circleci-builds in a real codex run.
cases.prompt: Use $circleci-builds to diagnose the first failing CircleCI step.

cases.purpose: Validate explicit skill mention routes to chunk in a real codex run.

cases.purpose: Validate intent-based routing to circleci-cli without explicit skill name.
cases.prompt: Use the CircleCI CLI to authenticate and rerun the latest failed workflow.

cases.purpose: Validate unrelated prompts do not claim a CircleCI skill selection.
cases.prompt: Write a short onboarding checklist for new backend hires.
